headline: Northrop Grumman B-21 Progress Points To Long-Term Program Value
summary: Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) reports major milestones in the B-21 Raider bomber program, including successful aerial refueling tests. The company is moving into accelerated production for the B-21 Raider, a key U.S. long range stealth bomber program. Management is investing in advanced digital manufacturing and test infrastructure to support scaled B-21 output. The B-21 Raider sits at the core of Northrop Grumman's role as a prime contractor in U.S. defense aerospace, where programs can run...
